verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Below the Surface Beneath the Waves Where I was searching To find my way You Found Me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In quiet Waters You called my Name You showed me Mercy You showed me Grace You Found Me Jesus You Found Me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the Deep In the Deep Your Love is Breathing life back into me Now that I know how Mercy feels I want to go deeper still

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Below the Surface I'm finding truth A greater purpose I never knew Til you found Me Jesus You Found Me
